creator: ahze@ahze.net
text:
diff -ruN p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/Makefile p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile
--- p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/Makefile      Sat Apr  7 21:15:41 2001
+++ p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile  Sat Apr  7 21:15:55 2001
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile,v 1.1 2001/03/31 02:08:19
 will Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=      LJ-TextMessage
-PORTVERSION=   1.2
+PORTVERSION=   1.3
 CATEGORIES=    sysutils perl5
 MASTER_SITES=  http://livejournal.com/files/code/textmessage/ \
                ftp://ftp.livejournal.com/code/textmessage/
diff -ruN p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/distinfo p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo
--- p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/distinfo      Sat Apr  7 21:15:41 2001
+++ p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo  Sat Apr  7 21:16:21 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (LJ-TextMessage-1.2.tar.gz) = d4444eed0a88295f58d7620217671069
+MD5 (LJ-TextMessage-1.3.tar.gz) = 1b0d973cf17e6696daec81611221cbef
